requirement_topic.en: APUA Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System and Interconnection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: APUA BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统及并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: APUA BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統及併網要求

summary.en: The Antigua Public Utilities Authority (APUA) is the vertically integrated electricity utility and de facto sector authority in Antigua and Barbuda, responsible for generation, transmission, distribution, and retail supply. All grid-connected BESS installations — whether utility-scale, commercial and industrial (C&I), or behind-the-meter — require APUA technical review and a formal interconnection agreement before commissioning. Antigua and Barbuda's grid operates at 230/400 V (single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V) at 50 Hz — in line with the IEC/UK legacy system. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. A publicly accessible dedicated BESS interconnection technical specification from APUA had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; exporters and project developers must engage APUA directly to obtain current interconnection requirements before equipment procurement is finalised. Antigua and Barbuda is an OECS and CARICOM member state; regional energy frameworks (OECS Energy Policy) may provide additional guidance but do not substitute for APUA project-level review.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达公共事业局（APUA）是安提瓜和巴布达的垂直整合电力公用事业机构，也是事实上的行业主管机关，负责发电、输电、配电和零售供电。所有并网BESS装置——无论是公用事业规模、商业及工业（C&I）还是表后项目——均须取得APUA技术审查并签订正式并网协议，方可投入使用。安提瓜和巴布达电网采用IEC/英国传承体系，运行参数为230/400 V（单相230 V、三相400 V）、50 Hz。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对230/400 V 50 Hz进行设计、配置和验证。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认APUA公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格；出口商和项目开发商在设备采购最终确定前，须直接与APUA接触以获取现行并网要求。安提瓜和巴布达是OECS和CARICOM成员国，地区能源框架（OECS能源政策）可提供额外指引，但不能替代APUA项目级审查。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達公共事業局（APUA）是安提瓜和巴布達的垂直整合電力公用事業機構，也是事實上的行業主管機關，負責發電、輸電、配電和零售供電。所有併網BESS裝置——無論是公用事業規模、商業及工業（C&I）還是表後項目——均須取得APUA技術審查並簽訂正式併網協議，方可投入使用。安提瓜和巴布達電網採用IEC/英國傳承體系，運行參數為230/400 V（單相230 V、三相400 V）、50 Hz。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對230/400 V 50 Hz進行設計、配置和驗證。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認APUA公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格；出口商和項目開發商在設備採購最終確定前，須直接與APUA接觸以獲取現行併網要求。安提瓜和巴布達是OECS和CARICOM成員國，地區能源框架（OECS能源政策）可提供額外指引，但不能替代APUA項目級審查。

standards_or_laws: APUA (Antigua Public Utilities Authority) — sole grid operator and de facto interconnection authority; formal interconnection agreement required for all grid-connected BESS
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference for BESS grid integration)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Antigua and Barbuda Electricity Act — governing framework for APUA and electricity sector regulation
OECS Energy Policy — regional energy framework for OECS member states including Antigua and Barbuda (supplementary guidance)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). CRITICAL: Antigua and Barbuda uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz — both countries share 50 Hz frequency but the voltage levels differ. A PCS validated for China's 220/380 V system must be re-parameterised and re-tested for Antigua's 230/400 V grid; this is not a plug-and-play adaptation. Do not claim voltage equivalence between Chinese and Antigua and Barbuda grid specifications.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。重要提示：安提瓜和巴布达采用230/400 V 50 Hz——两国共享50 Hz频率，但电压等级不同。针对中国220/380 V系统验证的PCS须重新针对安提瓜230/400 V电网进行参数配置和重新测试；这并非即插即用的改造。切勿声称中国与安提瓜和巴布达电网规格电压等效。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。重要提示：安提瓜和巴布達採用230/400 V 50 Hz——兩國共享50 Hz頻率，但電壓等級不同。針對中國220/380 V系統驗證的PCS須重新針對安提瓜230/400 V電網進行參數配置和重新測試；這並非即插即用的改造。切勿聲稱中國與安提瓜和巴布達電網規格電壓等效。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy APUA's interconnection requirements. Key gaps: (a) grid voltage — Antigua and Barbuda is 230/400 V, China is 220/380 V; both are 50 Hz but PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive power parameters must be reconfigured and independently tested for 230/400 V before interconnection approval; (b) no publicly accessible APUA dedicated BESS interconnection technical specification has been confirmed — direct APUA engagement is mandatory at the earliest project stage; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications or APUA require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) hurricane resilience — BESS equipment connected to the Antigua grid may be subject to wind-load and enclosure requirements appropriate for Category 4–5 hurricane exposure; (e) communication interface — confirm SCADA/monitoring protocol required by APUA for BESS grid-connected assets.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足APUA并网要求。主要差距：（a）电网电压——安提瓜和巴布达为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；两者均为50 Hz，但PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和无功功率参数须重新针对230/400 V进行配置和独立测试，方可取得并网批准；（b）尚未确认APUA公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格——须在项目最早阶段直接与APUA接触，此为强制要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格或APUA要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）飓风韧性——接入安提瓜电网的BESS设备可能须满足适用于四至五级飓风暴露的风荷载和外壳要求；（e）通信接口——确认APUA对并网BESS资产所要求的SCADA/监控协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足APUA併網要求。主要差距：（a）電網電壓——安提瓜和巴布達為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；兩者均為50 Hz，但PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和無功功率參數須重新針對230/400 V進行配置和獨立測試，方可取得併網批准；（b）尚未確認APUA公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格——須在項目最早階段直接與APUA接觸，此為強制要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格或APUA要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）颶風韌性——接入安提瓜電網的BESS設備可能須滿足適用於四至五級颶風暴露的風荷載和外殼要求；（e）通訊接口——確認APUA對併網BESS資產所要求的SCADA/監控協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — APUA interconnection agreement and technical approval required for all grid-connected BESS in Antigua and Barbuda; dedicated BESS technical specification not confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with APUA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Antigua and Barbuda

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy APUA's Antigua and Barbuda interconnection requirements. While both China and Antigua share 50 Hz frequency, Antigua operates at 230/400 V versus China's 220/380 V — PCS must be re-parameterised and independently re-tested for 230/400 V before APUA interconnection approval. Engage APUA at the earliest project stage to obtain interconnection requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence expectations, and SCADA protocol specifications. No publicly accessible APUA BESS-specific technical specification has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct APUA engagement is essential.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足APUA安提瓜和巴布达并网要求。尽管中国和安提瓜同为50 Hz频率，但安提瓜运行电压为230/400 V，而中国为220/380 V——PCS须重新针对230/400 V进行参数配置并独立重新测试，方可取得APUA并网批准。应在项目最早阶段与APUA接触，获取并网要求、适用IEC 62933证据预期及SCADA协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认APUA公开发布BESS专属技术规格——直接与APUA接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足APUA安提瓜和巴布達併網要求。儘管中國和安提瓜同為50 Hz頻率，但安提瓜運行電壓為230/400 V，而中國為220/380 V——PCS須重新針對230/400 V進行參數配置並獨立重新測試，方可取得APUA併網批准。應在項目最早階段與APUA接觸，獲取併網要求、適用IEC 62933證據預期及SCADA協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認APUA公開發布BESS專屬技術規格——直接與APUA接觸至關重要。

requirement_topic.en: Renewable Energy and BESS Policy Framework — Barbuda Solar Microgrid and OECS Clean Energy Targets
requirement_topic.zh: 可再生能源及BESS政策框架——巴布达太阳能微电网与OECS清洁能源目标
requirement_topic.zht: 可再生能源及BESS政策框架——巴布達太陽能微電網與OECS清潔能源目標

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda has committed to ambitious renewable energy targets, including 100% renewable electricity by 2030 under its National Energy Policy and SIDS commitments. The post-Hurricane Irma (2017) rebuilding of Barbuda included solar-plus-storage microgrid pilot projects focused on resilience — a key driver for BESS demand on the island. APUA manages the transition and any grid-connected or microgrid BESS installation requires APUA engagement. The OECS Sustainable Energy Framework and CARICOM Energy Policy provide regional policy alignment. Dedicated BESS-specific legislation or a mandatory conformity regime separate from APUA project approval has not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. Project developers should verify the current regulatory and incentive landscape with the Antigua and Barbuda Department of Environment and the OECS Commission before project commitment.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达已承诺实现雄心勃勃的可再生能源目标，包括根据其国家能源政策和SIDS承诺到2030年实现100%可再生电力。2017年飓风伊尔玛过后，巴布达的重建工程包括以韧性为核心的太阳能+储能微电网试点项目，这是推动该岛BESS需求的关键因素。APUA负责管理能源转型，任何并网或微电网BESS装置均须与APUA接触。OECS可持续能源框架和CARICOM能源政策提供地区政策协调。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认独立于APUA项目审批之外的BESS专属立法或强制合格评定制度。项目开发商在作出项目承诺前，应向安提瓜和巴布达环境部及OECS委员会核实现行监管和激励政策。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達已承諾實現雄心勃勃的可再生能源目標，包括根據其國家能源政策和SIDS承諾到2030年實現100%可再生電力。2017年颶風伊爾瑪過後，巴布達的重建工程包括以韌性為核心的太陽能+儲能微電網試點項目，這是推動該島BESS需求的關鍵因素。APUA負責管理能源轉型，任何併網或微電網BESS裝置均須與APUA接觸。OECS可持續能源框架和CARICOM能源政策提供地區政策協調。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認獨立於APUA項目審批之外的BESS專屬立法或強制合格評定制度。項目開發商在作出項目承諾前，應向安提瓜和巴布達環境部及OECS委員會核實現行監管和激勵政策。

standards_or_laws: Antigua and Barbuda National Energy Policy — 100% renewable electricity target by 2030
OECS Sustainable Energy Framework — regional renewable energy and storage policy alignment for OECS member states
CARICOM Energy Policy — Caribbean Community energy policy framework
APUA — project approval authority for all BESS installations; direct engagement required for interconnection and microgrid configurations

summary.en: China's energy storage expansion is governed by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC) and National Energy Administration (NEA) through Action Plans for New Energy Storage Development. GB/T 36558-2023 is the system-level technical standard for grid-connected BESS. Project approval follows local grid operator (State Grid / Southern Grid) connection procedures. None of China's BESS project approval or grid-connection documentation is relevant to, recognised by, or transferable to APUA's project approval process in Antigua and Barbuda.
summary.zh: 中国储能扩张由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）和国家能源局（NEA）通过《新型储能发展实施方案》管控。GB/T 36558-2023是并网BESS的系统级技术标准。项目审批遵循地方电网运营商（国家电网/南方电网）的并网程序。中国的BESS项目审批或并网文件均与APUA在安提瓜和巴布达的项目审批程序无关，不被认可，也不可转用。
summary.zht: 中國儲能擴張由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）和國家能源局（NEA）通過《新型儲能發展實施方案》管控。GB/T 36558-2023是併網BESS的系統級技術標準。項目審批遵循地方電網運營商（國家電網/南方電網）的併網程序。中國的BESS項目審批或併網文件均與APUA在安提瓜和巴布達的項目審批程序無關，不被認可，也不可轉用。

standards_or_laws: NDRC/NEA — 关于加快推动新型储能发展的指导意见 (Guidance on Accelerating the Development of New Energy Storage; policy driver for BESS in China's grid)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese BESS policy approvals and NEA documentation are not applicable to Antigua and Barbuda. The policy gap is structural: Antigua and Barbuda lacks a dedicated mandatory BESS conformity regime (as of dataset date) but all grid-connected and microgrid BESS projects must obtain APUA project approval and satisfy any applicable IEC standards referenced in project specifications. Exporters targeting BESS projects for the Barbuda solar microgrid or APUA grid-connected projects should: (a) engage APUA and the Antigua and Barbuda Department of Environment early to understand current approval pathways; (b) assess whether the project qualifies for any OECS or Caribbean Development Bank (CDB) renewable energy financing, which may specify international standard requirements; (c) account for post-hurricane resilience design requirements specific to Barbuda (wind loads, flood elevation, rapid restoration design).
gap.zh: 差距：中国BESS政策审批和NEA文件不适用于安提瓜和巴布达。政策差距属于结构性问题：安提瓜和巴布达目前（截至本数据集日期）缺乏专门的强制性BESS合格评定制度，但所有并网和微电网BESS项目均须取得APUA项目审批，并满足项目规格中引用的任何适用IEC标准。针对巴布达太阳能微电网或APUA并网项目的BESS出口商应：（a）尽早与APUA及安提瓜和巴布达环境部接触，了解现行审批路径；（b）评估项目是否符合OECS或加勒比开发银行（CDB）可再生能源融资资格，该融资可能规定国际标准要求；（c）考虑巴布达特有的飓风后韧性设计要求（风荷载、防洪高程、快速恢复设计）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國BESS政策審批和NEA文件不適用於安提瓜和巴布達。政策差距屬於結構性問題：安提瓜和巴布達目前（截至本數據集日期）缺乏專門的強制性BESS合格評定制度，但所有併網和微電網BESS項目均須取得APUA項目審批，並滿足項目規格中引用的任何適用IEC標準。針對巴布達太陽能微電網或APUA併網項目的BESS出口商應：（a）盡早與APUA及安提瓜和巴布達環境部接觸，瞭解現行審批路徑；（b）評估項目是否符合OECS或加勒比開發銀行（CDB）可再生能源融資資格，該融資可能規定國際標準要求；（c）考慮巴布達特有的颶風後韌性設計要求（風荷載、防洪高程、快速恢復設計）。

mandatory_status.target: APUA project approval mandatory for all grid-connected and microgrid BESS; dedicated mandatory BESS conformity regime not confirmed as of dataset date — verify current status with APUA and Antigua and Barbuda Department of Environment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory project approval by NDRC / NEA / local grid operator in China; not transferable to Antigua and Barbuda

source.publisher: Organisation of Eastern Caribbean States (OECS) — Energy Policy and Sustainable Energy Framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Antigua and Barbuda does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS conformity regime as of the dataset date. All grid-connected and microgrid BESS installations require APUA project approval. The Barbuda post-Irma solar-plus-storage rebuilding programme underscores demand for IEC-compliant, hurricane-resilient BESS. Chinese project approvals and GB/T standards documentation are not transferable. Engage APUA, the Department of Environment, and relevant Caribbean development finance institutions early to map the project approval pathway.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，安提瓜和巴布达尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS合格评定制度。所有并网和微电网BESS装置均须取得APUA项目审批。巴布达飓风伊尔玛灾后太阳能+储能重建计划凸显了对符合IEC标准、具备飓风韧性的BESS的需求。中国项目审批和GB/T标准文件不可转用。应尽早与APUA、环境部及相关加勒比开发融资机构接触，规划项目审批路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，安提瓜和巴布達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS合格評定制度。所有併網和微電網BESS裝置均須取得APUA項目審批。巴布達颶風伊爾瑪災後太陽能+儲能重建計畫凸顯了對符合IEC標準、具備颶風韌性的BESS的需求。中國項目審批和GB/T標準文件不可轉用。應盡早與APUA、環境部及相關加勒比開發融資機構接觸，規劃項目審批路徑。

requirement_topic.en: ABBS Product Conformity and IEC 62933 System-Level Technical Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ABBS产品合格评定及IEC 62933系统级技术要求
requirement_topic.zht: ABBS產品合格評定及IEC 62933系統級技術要求

summary.en: The Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS) is the national standards body responsible for product standards and conformity. ABBS operates under the Standards Act and may adopt or reference international standards (IEC, ISO, ASTM, BS) for product categories. A confirmed mandatory pre-market conformity requirement for stationary BESS specifically under ABBS had not been identified from official sources as of the dataset date. In the absence of a dedicated BESS mandatory regime, project-level specifications — including those in APUA interconnection agreements and any Caribbean Development Bank or IDB-funded project requirements — typically reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards: IEC 62933-2-1 for unit parameters and testing, and IEC 62933-5-2 for electrochemical system safety. Exporters should contact ABBS directly to confirm whether any mandatory conformity or type-approval obligation applies to imported BESS equipment.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达标准局（ABBS）是负责产品标准和合格评定的国家标准机构，依据《标准法》运作，可针对特定产品类别采纳或引用国际标准（IEC、ISO、ASTM、BS）。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认ABBS针对固定式BESS的强制性预市场合格评定要求。在缺乏专门BESS强制制度的情况下，项目级规格——包括APUA并网协议及加勒比开发银行或美洲开发银行资助项目的要求——通常引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准：IEC 62933-2-1用于单元参数和测试，IEC 62933-5-2用于电化学系统安全。出口商应直接联系ABBS，确认进口BESS设备是否适用任何强制合格评定或型式批准义务。
summary.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達標準局（ABBS）是負責產品標準和合格評定的國家標準機構，依據《標準法》運作，可針對特定產品類別採納或引用國際標準（IEC、ISO、ASTM、BS）。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認ABBS針對固定式BESS的強制性預市場合格評定要求。在缺乏專門BESS強制制度的情況下，項目級規格——包括APUA併網協議及加勒比開發銀行或美洲開發銀行資助項目的要求——通常引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準：IEC 62933-2-1用於單元參數和測試，IEC 62933-5-2用於電化學系統安全。出口商應直接聯繫ABBS，確認進口BESS設備是否適用任何強制合格評定或型式批准義務。

standards_or_laws: ABBS (Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards) — national standards and conformity body; confirm current mandatory scope for BESS directly
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems

IEC 63056 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems (system integration safety)

summary.en: China's BESS system-level standards include GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34131-2017 (Technical Specifications of Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage Stations). These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62933 and are not accepted as equivalents in project specifications or APUA/ABBS conformity review. Where IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence is required by the project owner or ABBS, Chinese GB/T test reports and certificates must be supplemented with IEC-standard test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国BESS系统级标准包括GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34131-2017（电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范）。上述中国标准未与IEC 62933协调，不被项目规格或APUA/ABBS合格评定审查接受为等效依据。若项目业主或ABBS要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，中国GB/T测试报告和证书须由来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC标准测试证据作为补充。
summary.zht: 中國BESS系統級標準包括GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34131-2017（電化學儲能電站用鋰離子電池管理系統技術規範）。上述中國標準未與IEC 62933協調，不被項目規格或APUA/ABBS合格評定審查接受為等效依據。若項目業主或ABBS要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，中國GB/T測試報告和證書須由來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC標準測試證據作為補充。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能电站用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Specifications of Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage Stations)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed mandatory BESS conformity regime under ABBS has been identified as of the dataset date — this is a high-priority information gap. Confirm directly with ABBS. In project practice, IEC 62933 series is the expected technical baseline. Chinese GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 are not substitutes for IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence. Exporters should: (a) contact ABBS to verify whether BESS is in a regulated product category; (b) prepare IEC 62933-2-1 unit test documentation and IEC 62933-5-2 system safety evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for project submission; (c) confirm BMS (battery management system) documentation requirements, as IEC 62933-5-2 includes BMS functional safety provisions that differ from GB/T 34131.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ABBS下的强制性BESS合格评定制度——这是一个高优先级信息差距。请直接向ABBS确认。在项目实践中，IEC 62933系列是预期的技术基准。中国GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131不能替代IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据。出口商应：（a）联系ABBS核实BESS是否属于受监管产品类别；（b）为项目提交准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62933-2-1单元测试文件和IEC 62933-5-2系统安全证据；（c）确认电池管理系统（BMS）文件要求，因IEC 62933-5-2包含与GB/T 34131不同的BMS功能安全规定。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ABBS下的強制性BESS合格評定制度——這是一個高優先級信息差距。請直接向ABBS確認。在項目實踐中，IEC 62933系列是預期的技術基準。中國GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131不能替代IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據。出口商應：（a）聯繫ABBS核實BESS是否屬於受監管產品類別；（b）為項目提交準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62933-2-1單元測試文件和IEC 62933-5-2系統安全證據；（c）確認電池管理系統（BMS）文件要求，因IEC 62933-5-2包含與GB/T 34131不同的BMS功能安全規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory BESS conformity scope under ABBS not confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with ABBS; IEC 62933 compliance is expected in project specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 36558) or mandatory depending on specific requirement; GB/T BESS standards not accepted in Antigua and Barbuda

source.publisher: Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed mandatory BESS product conformity regime under ABBS has been identified as of the dataset date. In the absence of a dedicated regime, IEC 62933 series compliance is the expected project-level technical baseline. Chinese GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62933 evidence. Contact ABBS directly to confirm current mandatory scope. Prepare IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ABBS下的强制性BESS产品合格评定制度。在缺乏专门制度的情况下，IEC 62933系列合规是项目级预期技术基准。中国GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131不被接受为IEC 62933证据的替代依据。请直接联系ABBS确认现行强制性范围。为项目提交准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ABBS下的強制性BESS產品合格評定制度。在缺乏專門制度的情況下，IEC 62933系列合規是項目級預期技術基準。中國GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131不被接受為IEC 62933證據的替代依據。請直接聯繫ABBS確認現行強制性範圍。為項目提交準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2測試證據。
